title: T-105 — WIRING: FA planning/commercial tabs — wire MRP + Procurement + Commercial + Planning tabs into FA detail
prompt:
# T-105 — WIRING: FA planning/commercial tabs into FA detail page (slice of T-025)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.4-§5.9
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:537-838 (covers Planning 537-557, Commercial 559-586, MRP 763-804, Procurement 806-838) — tab nav at 314-403
Parent root: T-025

## Goal
Wire the 4 tab slices (T-101 MRP, T-102 Procurement, T-103 Commercial, T-104 Planning) into the FA detail page. Add tab triggers in the FA tabs nav (in correct order from prototype 314-315: planning → commercial → mrp → procurement, after core/production), pass shared FA data via props, and ensure Core-close gate locks Planning + Commercial tabs when `!coreDone`.

## Implementation contract
Modify `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/page.tsx` to import and render each tab component based on the active tab. Modify `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/fa-tabs.tsx` (tab nav) to add TabsTrigger for planning, commercial, mrp, procurement in the correct order, with locked state from coreDone (planning + commercial) per prototype 314-315. Shared FA entity, closed_* flags, brief_id, suppliers reference, D365 cache data flow from page server component into each tab via props. No console errors on tab switching.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/page.tsx [modify]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/fa-tabs.tsx [modify]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/__tests__/fa-tabs-wiring.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the FA detail page renders, when navigating tabs, then all 4 tabs (Planning, Commercial, MRP, Procurement) render in correct order matching prototype tabs array (lines 314-315), tab switching works without console errors, and the active tab content matches the active tab key.
2. Given Core is not closed (coreDone=false), when rendering the tab nav, then Planning and Commercial tab triggers are locked (disabled with lock indicator) per prototype 314-315; MRP and Procurement remain selectable.
3. Given a tab is active, when the page server component loads, then the shared FA data (fa entity, closed_* flags, brief_id, suppliers, d365 cache) is passed to the tab component via props.
4. Wiring test asserts each tab component is rendered with the correct props for its active key; no missing imports; no console.error during tab switching.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL/integration test that mounts page with mocked FA data, asserts tab order + locked state under !coreDone, switches tabs and verifies each tab component receives expected props with no console errors.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test fa-tabs-wiring`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify the individual tab components (T-101..T-104 own them)
- Do not bypass Core-close gate on Planning + Commercial
- Do not duplicate shared data fetching across tabs (single server-component query in page.tsx)
